# Agentic Desk

> Personal agentic desktop assistant: chat agent, voice speech-to-speech agent, and a Second Brain that exposes the user's coding principles, project context, and interaction history to any MCP-capable coding agent. Pre-implementation — no code exists yet; sub-project 1 (Foundation + Second Brain + Agent Loop) has an approved design and phase plan.

## Docs

- [README.md](README.md): start here, get started, pitfalls
- [PRODUCT.md](PRODUCT.md): vision, problem, differentiation
- [SYSTEM.md](SYSTEM.md): target architecture, with diagrams
- [DESIGN.md](DESIGN.md): index of per-sub-project design specs
- [PLAN.md](PLAN.md): phase-by-phase build plan for sub-project 1
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): entry point and conventions for coding agents working in this repo
- [MEMORY.md](MEMORY.md): the Second Brain's data model and import pipeline
- [SKILL.md](SKILL.md): planned agent-skill model (not yet implemented)
- [docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-06-foundation-second-brain-design.md](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-06-foundation-second-brain-design.md): the full approved design for sub-project 1

## Optional

- [docs/adr/](docs/adr/): architecture decision records, one per major decision
- [docs/explanation/README.md](docs/explanation/README.md): the "why" behind key design choices
- [SESSION_HANDOFF.md](SESSION_HANDOFF.md): current status and next actionable step
